<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Atlas Acquisition Agency | Local SEO and AI Search Funnels for Service Businesses</title>
<meta name="description" content="Atlas builds inbound funnels for service businesses: top of Google, recommended by AI tools like ChatGPT, and tracked calls every month.">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://atlasmarketingnc.com/">
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" content="Atlas Acquisition Agency | Local SEO and AI Search Funnels for Service Businesses">
<meta property="og:description" content="Atlas builds inbound funnels for service businesses: top of Google, recommended by AI tools like ChatGPT, and tracked calls every month.">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://atlasmarketingnc.com/">
<meta property="og:locale" content="en_US">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Atlas Acquisition Agency | Local SEO and AI Search for Service Businesses">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Top of Google. Recommended by ChatGPT. Tracked inbound calls every month.">
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "ProfessionalService",
  "name": "Atlas Acquisition Agency",
  "description": "Local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, and AI search visibility for service businesses. Based in the Charlotte and Mooresville, NC area, serving clients across the Southeast and beyond.",
  "url": "https://atlasmarketingnc.com/",
  "areaServed": "United States",
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "addressLocality": "Mooresville",
    "addressRegion": "NC",
    "addressCountry": "US"
  },
  "priceRange": "$$",
  "knowsAbout": ["Local SEO", "Google Business Profile optimization", "AI search visibility", "ChatGPT recommendations", "Google Maps ranking"]
}
</script>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@500;700;800;900&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#101014;
    --ink-soft:#3c3c46;
    --gray:#5b5b66;
    --line:#e6e6ec;
    --bg:#ffffff;
    --bg-alt:#f7f7fa;
    --purple:#6c2bd9;
    --purple-bright:#8b45f0;
    --purple-deep:#4a1a9e;
    --purple-tint:#f3edfd;
    --radius:10px;
  }
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    html{scroll-behavior:auto;}
    *,*::before,*::after{animation:none!important;transition:none!important;}
  }
  body{
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    color:var(--ink);
    background:var(--bg);
    line-height:1.6;
    font-size:17px;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  a{color:var(--purple);text-decoration:none;}
  a:focus-visible, button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--purple-bright);outline-offset:3px;border-radius:4px;}
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}

  .wrap{max-width:1120px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;}

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--purple);display:block;margin-bottom:14px;
  }

  /* ---------- nav ---------- */
  nav{
    position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .nav-inner{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:72px;}
  .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;}
  .brand img{height:46px;width:auto;}
  .brand .logo{
    font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:-.01em;color:var(--ink);
  }
  .brand .logo span{color:var(--purple);}
  .nav-links{display:flex;gap:28px;align-items:center;}
  .nav-links a{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;font-weight:500;}
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--ink);}
  .btn{
    display:inline-block;background:var(--purple);color:#fff;
    font-weight:600;font-size:15px;padding:12px 22px;border-radius:var(--radius);
    border:none;cursor:pointer;
    transition:background .18s ease, transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
  }
  .btn:hover{background:#5a21b8;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 24px -10px rgba(108,43,217,.5);}
  .btn.big{padding:16px 30px;font-size:16.5px;}
  .btn.ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--ink);border:1.5px solid var(--line);}
  .btn.ghost:hover{border-color:var(--ink);background:transparent;box-shadow:none;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.nav-links a:not(.btn){display:none;}}

  /* ---------- hero ---------- */
  .hero{padding:80px 0 92px;position:relative;}
  .hero-mark{
    position:absolute;top:30px;right:-60px;width:460px;opacity:.05;pointer-events:none;
    user-select:none;z-index:0;
  }
  .hero-grid{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;
    position:relative;z-index:1;
  }
  h1{
    font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:900;
    font-size:clamp(38px,4.6vw,56px);line-height:1.04;letter-spacing:-.025em;
  }
  h1 .hl{color:var(--purple);}
  .hero p.lede{margin-top:22px;font-size:19px;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:540px;}
  .hero-note{margin-top:16px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);}

  .fade-seq{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);animation:fadeUp .7s ease forwards;}
  .fade-seq.d1{animation-delay:.08s;}
  .fade-seq.d2{animation-delay:.18s;}
  .fade-seq.d3{animation-delay:.3s;}
  .fade-seq.d4{animation-delay:.42s;}
  @keyframes fadeUp{to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

  .svc-menu{margin-top:32px;max-width:560px;}
  .svc-menu .menu-label{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:12px;display:block;
  }
  .svc-menu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;}
  .menu-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;
    border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:14px 16px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;font-size:15px;background:var(--bg);
    transition:border-color .18s ease, background .18s ease, transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
  }
  .menu-item .arr{color:var(--purple);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;transition:transform .18s ease;}
  .menu-item:hover{border-color:var(--purple);background:var(--purple-tint);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 24px -14px rgba(108,43,217,.4);}
  .menu-item:hover .arr{transform:translateX(4px);}
  .menu-item.full{grid-column:1 / -1;background:var(--ink);color:#fff;border-color:var(--ink);}
  .menu-item.full:hover{background:#000;}
  .menu-item.full .arr{color:var(--purple-bright);}
  @media(max-width:520px){.svc-menu-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  .ai-card{
    background:var(--ink);border-radius:16px;padding:26px 26px 22px;color:#e8e8ee;
    box-shadow:0 24px 60px -24px rgba(16,16,20,.45);max-width:480px;margin-left:auto;
    animation:floaty 7s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes floaty{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-9px);}}
  .ai-card .q{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;padding-bottom:18px;border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a34;}
  .ai-card .q .tag,.ai-card .a .tag{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;
  }
  .ai-card .q .tag{background:#2a2a34;color:#a0a0ae;}
  .ai-card .a .tag{background:var(--purple);color:#fff;}
  .ai-card .q p{font-size:15.5px;color:#c9c9d4;}
  .ai-card .a{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;padding-top:18px;}
  .ai-card .a-body{font-size:15px;line-height:1.65;color:#c9c9d4;}
  .ai-card .pick{
    margin-top:12px;background:#1b1b23;border:1px solid #343442;border-left:3px solid var(--purple-bright);
    border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;
  }
  .ai-card .pick .name{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:16px;color:#fff;}
  .ai-card .pick .meta{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#8b45f0;margin-top:3px;}
  .ai-caption{
    max-width:480px;margin-left:auto;margin-top:14px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--gray);
  }
  @media(max-width:900px){
    .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:44px;}
    .ai-card,.ai-caption{margin-left:0;}
    .hero-mark{display:none;}
  }

  section{padding:92px 0;}
  section.alt{background:var(--bg-alt);border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  h2{
    font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(28px,3.2vw,40px);line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.02em;max-width:680px;
  }
  .section-lede{margin-top:16px;font-size:18px;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:660px;}

  /* ---------- problem ---------- */
  .problem-grid{margin-top:52px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;}
  .problem-card{
    background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:28px 26px;
    transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease;
  }
  .problem-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 18px 40px -22px rgba(16,16,20,.25);}
  .icon-chip{
    width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--purple-tint);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:16px;
  }
  .icon-chip svg{width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--purple);fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;}
  .problem-card h3{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:18.5px;letter-spacing:-.01em;margin-bottom:10px;}
  .problem-card p{font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
  @media(max-width:860px){.problem-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  /* ---------- funnel (WebFX-style: copy left, graphic right) ---------- */
  .funnel-grid{margin-top:52px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;}
  .fstage-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
  .fstage{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:44px 1fr;gap:16px;
    padding:18px 16px;border-radius:12px;
    transition:background .2s ease;
  }
  .fstage:hover{background:var(--purple-tint);}
  .fstage .fn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;
    background:var(--purple);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:2px;
  }
  .fstage h3{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:-.01em;margin-bottom:4px;}
  .fstage p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);}

  .funnel-visual{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
  .flayer{
    color:#fff;text-align:center;
    font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.02em;
    padding:20px 0;
    clip-path:polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 92% 100%, 8% 100%);
    opacity:0;transform:translateY(-14px) scale(.96);
    transition:opacity .5s ease, transform .5s ease;
    position:relative;
  }
  .flayer .fl-sub{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-weight:500;font-size:11.5px;letter-spacing:.1em;opacity:.85;margin-top:3px;}
  .flayer.l1{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#8b45f0,#7434e0);font-size:18px;}
  .flayer.l2{width:78%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#7434e0,#6c2bd9);font-size:17px;}
  .flayer.l3{width:57%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#6c2bd9,#5a21b8);font-size:16px;}
  .flayer.l4{width:38%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#5a21b8,#4a1a9e);font-size:15px;padding:16px 0;}
  .in .flayer{opacity:1;transform:none;}
  .in .flayer.l1{transition-delay:.05s;}
  .in .flayer.l2{transition-delay:.2s;}
  .in .flayer.l3{transition-delay:.35s;}
  .in .flayer.l4{transition-delay:.5s;}
  .funnel-out{
    margin-top:6px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--purple);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s ease .7s;
  }
  .in .funnel-out{opacity:1;}
  .funnel-out .pulse-arrow{animation:pulseDown 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;display:inline-block;}
  @keyframes pulseDown{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;}50%{transform:translateY(5px);opacity:.55;}}
  @media(max-width:900px){.funnel-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:44px;}}

  /* ---------- services ---------- */
  .svc-list{margin-top:52px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .svc{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px 1fr;gap:40px;
    padding:34px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);scroll-margin-top:90px;
  }
  .svc:last-child{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  .svc .svc-head{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;}
  .svc h3{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:-.015em;}
  .svc .svc-tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);display:block;margin-top:6px;}
  .svc p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:16.5px;max-width:620px;}
  .svc p .outcome{display:block;margin-top:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);}
  @media(max-width:860px){.svc{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:14px;}}

  /* ---------- proof ---------- */
  .case{margin-top:52px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;}
  .case-head{
    display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;
    padding:26px 32px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff;
  }
  .case-head h3{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:21px;letter-spacing:-.015em;}
  .case-head .loc{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);}
  .case-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
  .stat{padding:30px 32px;border-right:1px solid var(--line);}
  .stat:last-child{border-right:none;}
  .stat .num{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-weight:600;
    font-size:clamp(24px,2.4vw,32px);color:var(--ink);letter-spacing:-.02em;
  }
  .stat .num em{font-style:normal;color:var(--purple);}
  .stat .label{margin-top:8px;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.5;}
  .case-foot{padding:22px 32px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
  .case-foot strong{color:var(--ink);}
  @media(max-width:860px){
    .case-body{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .stat{border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
    .stat:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  }

  .proof-row{margin-top:28px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:20px;align-items:stretch;}
  .quote-card{
    background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:32px 34px;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  }
  .quote-card p{font-size:19px;line-height:1.55;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);}
  .quote-card p::before{
    content:'\201C';display:block;font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:900;
    font-size:54px;line-height:.6;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .quote-card cite{display:block;margin-top:16px;font-style:normal;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);}

  .report-card{
    background:var(--ink);border-radius:14px;padding:26px 26px 22px;color:#fff;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  }
  .report-card .rc-head{
    display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:11.5px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a0a0ae;
    padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a34;margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .rc-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--purple-bright);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(139,69,240,.9);animation:blink 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;}
  @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.35;}}
  .bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:10px;height:130px;flex:1;}
  .bar{
    flex:1;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--purple-bright),var(--purple-deep));
    border-radius:6px 6px 3px 3px;transform-origin:bottom;transform:scaleY(0);
    transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  }
  .in .bar{transform:scaleY(1);}
  .in .bar:nth-child(1){transition-delay:.05s;}.in .bar:nth-child(2){transition-delay:.13s;}
  .in .bar:nth-child(3){transition-delay:.21s;}.in .bar:nth-child(4){transition-delay:.29s;}
  .in .bar:nth-child(5){transition-delay:.37s;}.in .bar:nth-child(6){transition-delay:.45s;}
  .rc-foot{margin-top:16px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#a0a0ae;line-height:1.6;}
  .rc-foot strong{color:#fff;font-weight:600;}
  @media(max-width:860px){.proof-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  .standard-line{
    margin-top:20px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);
    padding:16px 20px;background:var(--purple-tint);border:1px solid #ddccf7;border-radius:var(--radius);
  }
  .standard-line strong{color:var(--purple);}

  /* ---------- process ---------- */
  .steps{margin-top:52px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;}
  .step{
    background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:26px 24px;
    transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;
  }
  .step:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--purple);box-shadow:0 18px 40px -22px rgba(108,43,217,.35);}
  .step .n{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--purple);display:block;margin-bottom:14px;}
  .step h3{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:17.5px;margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:-.01em;}
  .step p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
  @media(max-width:960px){.steps{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}}
  @media(max-width:600px){.steps{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  .who{max-width:720px;}
  .who p{margin-top:16px;font-size:18px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
  .who p strong{color:var(--ink);}

  /* ---------- CTA ---------- */
  .cta{
    background:var(--ink);color:#fff;border-radius:18px;padding:64px 56px;
    display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cta::after{
    content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(600px 300px at 85% 20%, rgba(108,43,217,.35), transparent 70%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .cta-mark{position:absolute;right:36px;bottom:-40px;width:230px;opacity:.16;pointer-events:none;}
  .cta > div, .cta > a{position:relative;z-index:1;}
  .cta h2{color:#fff;max-width:560px;}
  .cta p{margin-top:14px;color:#b9b9c4;font-size:17px;max-width:520px;}
  .cta .btn{background:var(--purple-bright);}
  .cta .btn:hover{background:var(--purple);}

  footer{padding:44px 0 56px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);margin-top:92px;}
  .foot-inner{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
  .foot-inner .brand img{height:38px;}
  .foot-inner p{font-size:14px;color:var(--gray);max-width:560px;}

  .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);transition:opacity .55s ease, transform .55s ease;}
  .reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none;}
  .reveal.dl1{transition-delay:.08s;}
  .reveal.dl2{transition-delay:.16s;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="wrap nav-inner">
    <a class="brand" href="#top" aria-label="Atlas Acquisition home"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Atlas Acquisition Agency" width="38" height="46"></a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#funnel">The funnel</a>
      <a href="#services">Services</a>
      <a href="#proof">Results</a>
      <a class="btn" href="https://calendly.com/atlasmarketingofficial/new-meeting" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<header class="hero" id="top">
  <img class="hero-mark" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="wrap hero-grid">
    <div>
      <span class="eyebrow fade-seq">Local SEO + AI search for service businesses</span>
      <h1 class="fade-seq d1">Your next customer just asked ChatGPT <span class="hl">who to call</span>.</h1>
      <p class="lede fade-seq d2">People now ask Google and AI tools who to hire before they ever pick up the phone. Atlas builds the funnel that turns those searches into inbound calls for your business.</p>

      <div class="svc-menu fade-seq d3">
        <span class="menu-label">What does your business need?</span>
        <div class="svc-menu-grid">
          <a class="menu-item" href="#local-seo">More calls from Google <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
          <a class="menu-item" href="#ai-search">Show up in AI answers <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
          <a class="menu-item" href="#gbp">Win the map pack <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
          <a class="menu-item" href="#proof">See real results <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
          <a class="menu-item full" href="#funnel">The full inbound funnel <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p class="hero-note fade-seq d4">No contracts sold on hype. Results tracked and reported monthly.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="fade-seq d2">
      <div class="ai-card" role="img" aria-label="Example of an AI assistant recommending Hoots Plumbing first for a Winston-Salem plumber search">
        <div class="q">
          <span class="tag">You</span>
          <p>Who is the best plumber in Winston-Salem?</p>
        </div>
        <div class="a">
          <span class="tag">AI</span>
          <div class="a-body">
            Based on local reputation and reviews, a strong option is:
            <div class="pick">
              <div class="name">Hoots Plumbing</div>
              <div class="meta">Recommended first &middot; Winston-Salem, NC</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="ai-caption">Illustration of a real client result. Open ChatGPT, ask for a plumber in Winston-Salem, and check it yourself.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="alt" id="problem">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="eyebrow">The problem</span>
    <h2>Most service businesses are invisible where customers actually look.</h2>
    <p class="section-lede">It is usually not a quality problem. It is a visibility problem, and it has three common causes.</p>
    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-card reveal">
        <div class="icon-chip"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.5" y2="16.5"/><line x1="8" y1="11" x2="14" y2="11"/></svg></div>
        <h3>Google cannot tell what you do or where</h3>
        <p>Most service business websites have no pages for their actual services or cities. If your site never names the service and the town, Google has no reason to show you for it. Someone else gets that call.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card reveal dl1">
        <div class="icon-chip"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 6h16M4 12h10M4 18h6"/><circle cx="19" cy="16" r="2.6"/></svg></div>
        <h3>AI gives out a short list. You are not on it.</h3>
        <p>When someone asks ChatGPT or Gemini who to hire, it recommends two or three companies. There is no page two. If the AI does not know you, you do not exist in that search.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card reveal dl2">
        <div class="icon-chip"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 20V10M10 20V4M16 20v-8M22 20H2"/></svg></div>
        <h3>Bigger budgets are buying your market</h3>
        <p>Franchises and private equity backed chains pay agencies to dominate local results. Owner-operators with better work and better reviews get buried under companies with bigger budgets, not better service.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="funnel">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="eyebrow">The funnel</span>
    <h2>Every service we run plugs into one funnel: search to call.</h2>
    <p class="section-lede">We do not sell disconnected marketing tasks. We build a path a customer actually travels, and we track every stage of it.</p>
    <div class="funnel-grid">
      <div class="fstage-list reveal">
        <div class="fstage">
          <span class="fn">1</span>
          <div>
            <h3>Found</h3>
            <p>A customer searches Google or asks an AI tool who to hire. Your company shows up at the top: rankings, map pack, AI recommendations.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fstage">
          <span class="fn">2</span>
          <div>
            <h3>Trusted</h3>
            <p>They check you out. Reviews, an active Google listing, and a site that names their exact problem convince them you are the real option.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fstage">
          <span class="fn">3</span>
          <div>
            <h3>Called</h3>
            <p>They call you directly. Not a shared lead, not a form five competitors also bought. Every call is tracked so you know where it came from.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fstage">
          <span class="fn">4</span>
          <div>
            <h3>Booked</h3>
            <p>You close the job. We report the numbers every month: rankings, calls, and what changed, so you always know what the funnel produced.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="funnel-visual reveal" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="flayer l1">FOUND<div class="fl-sub">SEARCH + AI VISIBILITY</div></div>
        <div class="flayer l2">TRUSTED<div class="fl-sub">REVIEWS + PRESENCE</div></div>
        <div class="flayer l3">CALLED<div class="fl-sub">TRACKED INBOUND</div></div>
        <div class="flayer l4">BOOKED</div>
        <div class="funnel-out"><span class="pulse-arrow">&darr;</span> REVENUE YOU CAN TRACE BACK</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="alt" id="services">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="eyebrow">Services</span>
    <h2>Pick the piece you need, or run the whole funnel.</h2>
    <div class="svc-list">
      <div class="svc reveal" id="local-seo">
        <div class="svc-head">
          <div class="icon-chip"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.5" y2="16.5"/></svg></div>
          <div>
            <h3>Local SEO</h3>
            <span class="svc-tag">01 / Get found for what you do</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p>We build the service and city pages your website is missing, so Google connects your company to the work you actually do and the areas you actually serve. This is the top of the funnel: if you are not found, nothing else matters.
        <span class="outcome">Example: one client had no city content on their site at all. We fixed the targeting and their map ranking has been climbing since.</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="svc reveal" id="gbp">
        <div class="svc-head">
          <div class="icon-chip"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 21s-7-5.6-7-11a7 7 0 0 1 14 0c0 5.4-7 11-7 11z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="2.6"/></svg></div>
          <div>
            <h3>Google Business Profile</h3>
            <span class="svc-tag">02 / Win the map pack</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p>The map pack gets the call before your website ever loads. We optimize your profile, tighten your service area, build your review count, and keep the listing active so Google keeps showing it.
        <span class="outcome">Example: one client went from zero Google reviews and no map presence to a review base and a spot in the local map pack.</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="svc reveal" id="ai-search">
        <div class="svc-head">
          <div class="icon-chip"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 3l1.7 4.6L18 9l-4.3 1.4L12 15l-1.7-4.6L6 9l4.3-1.4L12 3z"/><path d="M19 14l.8 2.2L22 17l-2.2.8L19 20l-.8-2.2L16 17l2.2-.8L19 14z"/></svg></div>
          <div>
            <h3>AI Search Visibility</h3>
            <span class="svc-tag">03 / Get recommended by ChatGPT</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p>Customers are starting their search inside ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity instead of Google. We structure your online presence so AI tools find you, trust you, and recommend you by name. Most agencies are not even watching this channel yet.
        <span class="outcome">Example: Hoots Plumbing now ranks at or near number one when people ask ChatGPT for a plumber in Winston-Salem, across multiple ways of asking.</span></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="proof">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="eyebrow">Proof</span>
    <h2>One real result, in full. Check it yourself.</h2>

    <div class="case reveal">
      <div class="case-head">
        <h3>Hoots Plumbing</h3>
        <span class="loc">Winston-Salem, NC &middot; Plumbing</span>
      </div>
      <div class="case-body">
        <div class="stat">
          <div class="num"><em>#1</em> on ChatGPT</div>
          <div class="label">Ranks at or near first when people ask ChatGPT for a Winston-Salem plumber, across multiple phrasings.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat">
          <div class="num">Calls <em>&uarr;</em> monthly</div>
          <div class="label">Inbound calls up roughly 50% from baseline and climbing, tracked and reported every month.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat">
          <div class="num">Map pack <em>&uarr;</em></div>
          <div class="label">Climbing the Google map rankings in Winston-Salem after we tightened their service area targeting.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="case-foot">
        <strong>What we found:</strong> the website had no dedicated service pages and no Winston-Salem content at all. Google had nothing to rank. We fixed the targeting, built the missing pages, and the funnel started producing.
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="proof-row">
      <div class="quote-card reveal">
        <p>I really appreciate you communicating. This has already exceeded your competition's efforts. If you keep this up you will be the top in your game.&rdquo;</p>
        <cite>Matt Hoots &middot; Hoots Plumbing &middot; Winston-Salem, NC</cite>
      </div>
      <div class="report-card reveal dl1" aria-label="Illustration of the monthly report every client receives">
        <div class="rc-head"><span>MONTHLY REPORT</span><span class="rc-dot"></span></div>
        <div class="bars" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="bar" style="height:34%"></div>
          <div class="bar" style="height:46%"></div>
          <div class="bar" style="height:42%"></div>
          <div class="bar" style="height:60%"></div>
          <div class="bar" style="height:74%"></div>
          <div class="bar" style="height:88%"></div>
        </div>
        <p class="rc-foot"><strong>What every client sees monthly:</strong> rankings, tracked calls, and where each one came from. Illustration, not client data.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="standard-line reveal"><strong>Our standard:</strong> every client is tracked the same way. Rankings, calls, and results reported monthly. If we cannot measure it, we do not claim it.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="alt" id="process">
  <div class="wrap">
    <span class="eyebrow">How it works</span>
    <h2>A straight line from audit to inbound calls.</h2>
    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step reveal">
        <span class="n">STEP 1</span>
        <h3>Audit</h3>
        <p>We pull up your Google rankings, your map listing, and what AI tools say about you right now. You see exactly what is broken before you pay for anything.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal dl1">
        <span class="n">STEP 2</span>
        <h3>Fix the foundation</h3>
        <p>Service pages, city content, and Google Business Profile targeting. The unglamorous work that determines whether Google shows you at all.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal dl2">
        <span class="n">STEP 3</span>
        <h3>Build the funnel</h3>
        <p>Reviews, listing activity, and the signals that push you up the map pack and onto AI recommendation lists. Call tracking goes live so every result is measured.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal dl2">
        <span class="n">STEP 4</span>
        <h3>Report every month</h3>
        <p>Rankings, calls, and what changed. Plain numbers, no vanity metrics. You always know what you are paying for.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="who">
  <div class="wrap who">
    <span class="eyebrow">Who we work with</span>
    <h2>Built for service businesses.</h2>
    <p>Plumbers, HVAC, electricians, roofers, landscapers, cleaners, contractors. <strong>If customers search for what you do and then call someone, we can build your funnel.</strong> We work directly with the owner, and every engagement starts with a live audit of your current visibility.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="book">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="cta reveal">
      <img class="cta-mark" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
      <div>
        <h2>See what AI says about your company right now.</h2>
        <p>Book a call. No pitch deck. We pull up your rankings and your AI results live, show you what is broken, and you decide from there.</p>
      </div>
      <a class="btn big" href="https://calendly.com/atlasmarketingofficial/new-meeting" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap foot-inner">
    <a class="brand" href="#top" aria-label="Back to top"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Atlas Acquisition Agency" width="32" height="39"></a>
    <p>Atlas Acquisition Agency &middot; Charlotte / Mooresville, NC &middot; Local SEO, Google Business Profile, and AI search funnels for service businesses.</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  (function(){
    if (window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add('in'); });
      return;
    }
    var obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      entries.forEach(function(e){
        if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); obs.unobserve(e.target); }
      });
    }, {threshold:.12});
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){ obs.observe(el); });
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html>
